tools.name: get_lists
tools.description: Get all grocery lists with their items. Returns list names, IDs, and all items with their status.

tools.name: add_item
tools.description: Add a new item to a grocery list. You can optionally add a note.

listId.description: The ID of the list to add the item to

value.description: The name/value of the item to add

tools.name: remove_item
tools.description: Remove an item from a grocery list

listId.description: The ID of the list containing the item

itemId.description: The ID of the item to remove

tools.name: update_item
tools.description: Update an item's details (name, category, note, or star rating)

listId.description: The ID of the list containing the item

itemId.description: The ID of the item to update

newValue.description: The new name/value for the item

categoryId.description: Optional category ID (or null to remove category)

tools.name: toggle_item
tools.description: Mark an item as crossed off or uncrossed

listId.description: The ID of the list containing the item

itemId.description: The ID of the item to toggle

crossedOff.description: Whether the item should be crossed off (true) or not (false)
